config.title: Stan minimalny/maksymalny wg magazynów #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50200" #include "50222"
'cObjectReport,cBuildQuery,cDrawReport,cButton,cRepDict #include "50526"
'opcja raportu dim g_nMode 'produkt i opakowanie dim oProd: set oProd = nothing dim oOpak: set oOpak = nothing dim g_pProdMag: set g_pProdMag = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() dim g_pProdMagCopy: set g_pProdMagCopy = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
'obiekt produkt-magazyn class cProdMag public m_idProdMag public m_pMagazyn public m_curStanMin public m_curStanMax public m_curCenaNetto1 public m_curCenaNetto2 public m_curCenaNetto3 public m_curCenaNetto4 public m_curCenaNetto5 public m_curCenaNetto6 public m_pWaluta1 public m_pWaluta2 public m_pWaluta3 public m_pWaluta4 public m_pWaluta5 public m_pWaluta6 public m_bDelete 'info czy usuwać rekord
public sub class_initialize() m_idProdMag = clng(0) set m_pMagazyn = nothing m_curStanMin = ccur(0) m_curStanMax = ccur(0) m_curCenaNetto1 = ccur(0) m_curCenaNetto2 = ccur(0) m_curCenaNetto3 = ccur(0) m_curCenaNetto4 = ccur(0) m_curCenaNetto5 = ccur(0) m_curCenaNetto6 = ccur(0) set m_pWaluta1 = oOpak.pWaluta set m_pWaluta2 = oOpak.opak_pWaluta2 set m_pWaluta3 = oOpak.opak_pWaluta3 set m_pWaluta4 = oOpak.opak_pWaluta4 set m_pWaluta5 = oOpak.opak_pWaluta5 set m_pWaluta6 = oOpak.opak_pWaluta6 m_bDelete = false end sub
public sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pMagazyn = nothing set m_pWaluta1 = nothing set m_pWaluta2 = nothing set m_pWaluta3 = nothing set m_pWaluta4 = nothing set m_pWaluta5 = nothing set m_pWaluta6 = nothing end sub end class
function fopen() g_nMode = clng(trans_.var(APPVAR_MODE))
'inicjacja produktu i opakowania if not init then exit function end if
'inicjalizacja obiektów (generowanie wyników) initialObjects
'pobierz magazyny addProdMag
'tabela z wynikami drawRaport g_oDrawRep
fopen = true end function
'-------------------------------- 'ustawienie produktu i opakowania '-------------------------------- function init(): init = false if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_PRODUKT) then if trans_.var(APPVAR_PRODUKT) > clng(0) then set oProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,clng(trans_.var(APPVAR_PRODUKT))) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PRODUKT).value = oProd.strNazwa end if end if if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_OPAKOWANIE) then if trans_.var(APPVAR_OPAKOWANIE) > clng(0) then if not oProd is nothing then dim nLP: nLP = oProd.listOpakowania.findonid(clng(trans_.var(APPVAR_OPAKOWANIE))) set oOpak = oProd.listOpakowania.get(nLP) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OPAKOWANIE).value = oOpak.strNazwa end if end if end if if oProd is nothing or oOpak is nothing then trans_.message 7000, 0, "Brak produktu lub opakowania" exit function end if init = true end function
'--------------------------------------------------- 'dodaje obiekty produkt-magazyn do tabeli g_pProdMag '--------------------------------------------------- sub addProdMag() dim strSQL strSQL = "select idobj from n5magazyn where eTyp = N5TYPMAG_PODSTAWOWY order by strNazwa" dim oRS: set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) dim oProdMag, oProdMagCopy, idProdMag, strWhere
'tworzy nowy obiekt prod_mag i ustawia magazyn do while not oRS.EOF set oProdMag = new cProdMag set oProdMagCopy = new cProdMag set oProdMag.m_pMagazyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,clng(oRS(0).value)) set oProdMagCopy.m_pMagazyn = oProdMag.m_pMagazyn strWhere = "prmg_pProdukt = " + CStr(oProd.idobj) + " and prmg_pOpakowanie = " + CStr(oOpak.idobj) + " and prmg_pMagazyn = " +_ CStr(oProdMag.m_pMagazyn.idobj) idProdMag = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT_MAGAZYN,strWhere)
'dodaj do tabeli obiekt w zależności od trybu: MODE_ADD,MODE_EDIT,MODE_DELETE if g_nMode = MODE_ADD then if idProdMag = clng(0) then g_pProdMag.add oProdMag g_pProdMagCopy.add oProdMagCopy end if elseif g_nMode = MODE_EDIT or g_nMode = MODE_DELETE then if idProdMag > clng(0) then dim oPM: set oPM = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT_MAGAZYN,idProdMag) set oProdMag = copyObjToTable(oPM) set oProdMagCopy = copyObjToTable(oPM) g_pProdMag.add oProdMag g_pProdMagCopy.add oProdMagCopy end if end if oRS.movenext loop end sub
'------------------------------------- 'kopiuje dane obiektu z bazy do tabeli '------------------------------------- function copyObjToTable(oPM) dim oProdMag: set oProdMag = new cProdMag with oProdMag .m_idProdMag = oPM.idobj set .m_pMagazyn = oPM.prmg_pMagazyn .m_curStanMin = ccur(oPM.prmg_curStanMin) .m_curStanMax = ccur(oPM.prmg_curStanMax) .m_curCenaNetto1 = ccur(oPM.prmg_curCenaNetto1) .m_curCenaNetto2 = ccur(oPM.prmg_curCenaNetto2) .m_curCenaNetto3 = ccur(oPM.prmg_curCenaNetto3) .m_curCenaNetto4 = ccur(oPM.prmg_curCenaNetto4) .m_curCenaNetto5 = ccur(oPM.prmg_curCenaNetto5) .m_curCenaNetto6 = ccur(oPM.prmg_curCenaNetto6) set .m_pWaluta1 = oPM.prmg_pWaluta1 set .m_pWaluta2 = oPM.prmg_pWaluta2 set .m_pWaluta3 = oPM.prmg_pWaluta3 set .m_pWaluta4 = oPM.prmg_pWaluta4 set .m_pWaluta5 = oPM.prmg_pWaluta5 set .m_pWaluta6 = oPM.prmg_pWaluta6 end with set copyObjToTable = oProdMag end function
'-------------------------------------------- 'porównuje 2 obiekty na pozycji iter w tabeli 'zwraca true gdy się różnią '-------------------------------------------- function compareObj(byval iter): compareObj = true dim oPMag: set oPMag = g_pProdMagCopy.value(iter) with g_pProdMag.value(iter) if .m_curStanMin <> oPMag.m_curStanMin then exit function end if if .m_curStanMax <> oPMag.m_curStanMax then exit function end if if .m_curCenaNetto1 <> oPMag.m_curCenaNetto1 then exit function end if if .m_curCenaNetto2 <> oPMag.m_curCenaNetto2 then exit function end if if .m_curCenaNetto3 <> oPMag.m_curCenaNetto3 then exit function end if if .m_curCenaNetto4 <> oPMag.m_curCenaNetto4 then exit function end if if .m_curCenaNetto5 <> oPMag.m_curCenaNetto5 then exit function end if if .m_curCenaNetto6 <> oPMag.m_curCenaNetto6 then exit function end if if not .m_pWaluta1 is oPMag.m_pWaluta1 then exit function end if if not .m_pWaluta2 is oPMag.m_pWaluta2 then exit function end if if not .m_pWaluta3 is oPMag.m_pWaluta3 then exit function end if if not .m_pWaluta4 is oPMag.m_pWaluta4 then exit function end if if not .m_pWaluta5 is oPMag.m_pWaluta5 then exit function end if if not .m_pWaluta6 is oPMag.m_pWaluta6 then exit function end if end with compareObj = false end function
'------------ 'rysuj raport '------------ sub drawRaport(byref g_oDrawRep) if g_pProdMag.UpperIndex >= clng(0) then drawResultTable g_oDrawRep drawActionTable else drawBrakDanych end if end sub
'----------------- 'tabela z wynikami '----------------- sub drawResultTable(byref g_oDrawRep) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall drawHeader pTB, g_oDrawRep drawBody pTB, g_oDrawRep end sub
'--------------------- 'rysuj nagłowek tabeli '--------------------- sub drawHeader(byref pTB, byref g_oDrawRep) dim oObjRep, iter, bOption pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize = 4 'kolejne komórki g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 2, "Magazyn", 3000, "", 2, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 3, "Stan min", 2000, "", 2, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 4, "Stan max", 2000, "", 2, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 5, "Ceny netto", MINIMIZE_SIZE, "", 1, 12, false if g_nMode = MODE_DELETE then g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 6, "", 2000, "", 2, 1, false end if pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize = 4 g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 7, "Cena 1", 2000, "", 1, 2, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 8, "Cena 2", 2000, "", 1, 2, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 9, "Cena 3", 2000, "", 1, 2, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 10, "Cena 4", 2000, "", 1, 2, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 11, "Cena 5", 2000, "", 1, 2, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 12, "Cena 6", 2000, "", 1, 2, false end sub
'--------------- 'kolejne wiersze '--------------- sub drawBody(byref pTB, byref g_oDrawRep) dim iter for iter = 0 to g_pProdMag.upperIndex drawRow pTB, g_oDrawRep, iter next end sub
'----------------------- 'rysuj pojedynczy wiersz '----------------------- sub drawRow(byref pTB, byref g_oDrawRep, byval iter) pTB.newrow 'ustawienie właściwości dla wiersza set pTB.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() pTB.row.userprop.prop(PROP_REC_NUM) = iter
dim oProdMag: set oProdMag = g_pProdMag.value(iter)
'właściwości całego wiersza pTB.row.fontsize = 3 dim crColor if (iter+1) mod 2 = 0 then pTB.row.backcolor = ROW_COLOR crColor = ROW_COLOR else crColor = WHITE_COLOR end if
g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, oProdMag.m_pMagazyn.strNazwa, "Verdana", ALIGN_RIGHT, 0, 0, "" g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_STAN_MIN, ccur(oProdMag.m_curStanMin), "Verdana", 2, 10, "", crColor g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_STAN_MAX, ccur(oProdMag.m_curStanMax), "Verdana", 2, 10, "", crColor
g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_CENA_1, ccur(oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto1), "Verdana", 2, 10, oProdMag.m_pWaluta1.strSkrot, crColor pTB.newcell g_oDrawRep.drawPicture pTB, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA, "Wybór z listy", "chooseWaluta1", pTB.row.ident pTB.element.ignoresysdisable false g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_CENA_2, ccur(oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto2), "Verdana", 2, 10, oProdMag.m_pWaluta1.strSkrot, crColor pTB.newcell g_oDrawRep.drawPicture pTB, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA, "Wybór z listy", "chooseWaluta2", pTB.row.ident g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_CENA_3, ccur(oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto3), "Verdana", 2, 10, oProdMag.m_pWaluta1.strSkrot, crColor pTB.newcell g_oDrawRep.drawPicture pTB, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA, "Wybór z listy", "chooseWaluta3", pTB.row.ident g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_CENA_4, ccur(oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto4), "Verdana", 2, 10, oProdMag.m_pWaluta1.strSkrot, crColor pTB.newcell g_oDrawRep.drawPicture pTB, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA, "Wybór z listy", "chooseWaluta4", pTB.row.ident g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_CENA_5, ccur(oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto5), "Verdana", 2, 10, oProdMag.m_pWaluta1.strSkrot, crColor pTB.newcell g_oDrawRep.drawPicture pTB, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA, "Wybór z listy", "chooseWaluta5", pTB.row.ident g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, CTRLID_CENA_6, ccur(oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto6), "Verdana", 2, 10, oProdMag.m_pWaluta1.strSkrot, crColor pTB.newcell g_oDrawRep.drawPicture pTB, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA, "Wybór z listy", "chooseWaluta6", pTB.row.ident
'dodatkowy przycisk usuń if g_nMode = MODE_DELETE then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE).disable = true pTB.newcell g_oDrawRep.drawButtonExt pTB, "Usuń", 4, "Zaznaczenie do usunięcia obiektu", "delProdMag", pTB.row.ident, CTRLID_DEL_BUTTON pTB.element.ignoresysdisable true end if
end sub
'--------------------------------------------------------- 'komunikat w przypadku braku magazynów o typie podstawowym '--------------------------------------------------------- sub drawBrakDanych() dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize=4 dim strText: strText = "" if g_nMode = MODE_ADD then strText = "Brak magazynów o typie Podstawowy" elseif g_nMode = MODE_EDIT then strText = "Brak danych do edycji" else strText = "Brak danych do usunięcia" end if pTB.newcell.addtext strText pTB.cell.width = 10000 end sub
'------------ 'tabela akcji '------------ sub drawActionTable dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ACTION_TABLE)) 'przyciski pTB.newrow.newcell dim oButton : set oButton = new cButton oButton.newButton pTB, CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON, "saveChanges", "Zapisz zmiany", 8, ALIGN_RIGHT, true oButton.newButton pTB, CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON, "cancel", "Anuluj", 8, ALIGN_RIGHT, true end sub
'------------------ 'anulowanie raportu '------------------ function cancel(pHLI) page_.goback end function
'------------- 'zapis do bazy '------------- function saveChanges(pHLI) dim iter dim bMsg: bMsg = false if g_nMode = MODE_DELETE then for iter = 0 to g_pProdMag.upperIndex if g_pProdMagCopy.value(iter).m_bDelete then deleteProdMag g_pProdMagCopy.value(iter) bMsg = true end if next if bMsg then MessageBox "Usunięto wybrane rekordy.", "Usuwanie danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation else trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie wybrano rekordów." exit function end if else for iter = 0 to g_pProdMag.upperIndex if compareObj(iter) then updateProdMag g_pProdMagCopy.value(iter) bMsg = true end if next if bMsg then if g_nMode = MODE_ADD then MessageBox "Zapisano." , "Dodawanie danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation elseif g_nMode = MODE_EDIT then MessageBox "Zapisano." , "Edycja danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if else trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie wprowadzono zmian." exit function end if end if page_.goback end function
'--------------------------------------------- 'dodaj nowy obiekt do tabeli n5produkt_magazyn '--------------------------------------------- function updateProdMag(byref oProdMag) dim oPMObject if g_nMode = MODE_ADD then set oPMObject = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT_MAGAZYN) elseif g_nMode = MODE_EDIT then set oPMObject = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT_MAGAZYN,oProdMag.m_idProdMag) end if with oPMObject set .prmg_pProdukt = oProd set .prmg_pOpakowanie = oOpak set .prmg_pMagazyn = oProdMag.m_pMagazyn .prmg_curStanMin = oProdMag.m_curStanMin .prmg_curStanMax = oProdMag.m_curStanMax .prmg_curCenaNetto1 = oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto1 .prmg_curCenaNetto2 = oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto2 .prmg_curCenaNetto3 = oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto3 .prmg_curCenaNetto4 = oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto4 .prmg_curCenaNetto5 = oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto5 .prmg_curCenaNetto6 = oProdMag.m_curCenaNetto6 set .prmg_pWaluta1 = oProdMag.m_pWaluta1 set .prmg_pWaluta2 = oProdMag.m_pWaluta2 set .prmg_pWaluta3 = oProdMag.m_pWaluta3 set .prmg_pWaluta4 = oProdMag.m_pWaluta4 set .prmg_pWaluta5 = oProdMag.m_pWaluta5 set .prmg_pWaluta6 = oProdMag.m_pWaluta6 end with if not trans_.saveobjects() then trans_.message 7000, 0, "Zapis do bazy nieudany dla magazynu: " + oProdMag.m_pMagazyn.strNazwa exit function end if end function
'------------------------ 'zaznaczenie do usunięcia '------------------------ function delProdMag(pHLI) dim iRowNr dim oRow: set oRow = page_.ctrl(pHLI.prop(100)) if not oRow.userprop is nothing then iRowNr = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_REC_NUM) 'zaznacz do usunięcia if g_pProdMagCopy.value(iRowNr).m_bDelete then g_pProdMagCopy.value(iRowNr).m_bDelete = false changeRowColor oRow, false else g_pProdMagCopy.value(iRowNr).m_bDelete = true changeRowColor oRow, true end if end if end function
'------------------------ 'usunięcie obiektu z bazy '------------------------ function deleteProdMag(byref oProdMag) dim oDelObj: set oDelObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT_MAGAZYN,oProdMag.m_idProdMag) oDelObj.markdel = true set oDelObj = nothing if not trans_.saveobjects() then end if end function
'-------------------------------------------- 'ustawia kolor dla wiersza w zależności od LP '-------------------------------------------- function setRowColor(iLP) if iLP mod 2 = 0 then setRowColor = ROW_COLOR else setRowColor = WHITE_COLOR end if end function
'--------------------------- 'zmienia kolor dla kontrolek '--------------------------- function setColorForCtrl(oRow,color) dim iter for iter = 2 to 14 oRow.cell(iter).element(1).backcolor = color next end function
'------------------- 'kolorowanie wiersza '------------------- sub changeRowColor(byref oRow, byval bValue) if bValue then if g_nMode = MODE_DELETE then 'wiersz na różowo oRow.backcolor = PINK_COLOR setColorForCtrl oRow, PINK_COLOR else 'wiersz na żółto oRow.backcolor = YELLOW_COLOR setColorForCtrl oRow, YELLOW_COLOR end if else 'usuń żółty kolor if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_REC_NUM) then dim iLP : iLP = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_REC_NUM) oRow.backcolor = setRowColor(iLP+1) setColorForCtrl oRow, setRowColor(iLP+1) end if end if end sub
function c##CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON##_ongetdata = true if g_pProdMag.upperIndex >= 0 then oCtrl.disable = false else oCtrl.disable = true end if end function
function c##CTRLID_DEL_BUTTON##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_DEL_BUTTON##_ongetdata = true dim iRowNr dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then iRowNr = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_REC_NUM) if g_pProdMagCopy.value(iRowNr).m_bDelete then oCtrl.value = "Cofnij" else oCtrl.value = "Usuń" end if end if end function
CHOOSE_WALUTA(1) CHOOSE_WALUTA(2) CHOOSE_WALUTA(3) CHOOSE_WALUTA(4) CHOOSE_WALUTA(5) CHOOSE_WALUTA(6)
QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_STAN_MIN,m_curStanMin) QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_STAN_MAX,m_curStanMax)
QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_CENA_1,m_curCenaNetto1) QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_CENA_2,m_curCenaNetto2) QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_CENA_3,m_curCenaNetto3) QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_CENA_4,m_curCenaNetto4) QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_CENA_5,m_curCenaNetto5) QXR_CURRENCY_CUSTOM_GETDATA_DATAENTER(CTRLID_CENA_6,m_curCenaNetto6)
